name: Employer Policy & Program Management
description: Configures employer-level mobility programs including subsidy logic, plan design, market variations, approval rules, and policy governance.

name: Quote, Subsidy & Savings Configurator
description: Calculates rider and employer cost scenarios, subsidy rules, and savings projections before enrollment or policy changes.

name: Eligibility, Payroll & HRIS Sync
description: Synchronizes employee eligibility, payroll deductions, employment events, and employer master data with HR and payroll systems.

name: Bike Catalog & Recommendation
description: Presents bike, accessory, and package choices with recommendation logic based on commute profile, employer policy, and local availability.

name: Order Orchestration & Checkout
description: Runs the end-to-end ordering flow including approvals, signatures, reservations, order routing, and state transitions.

name: Rider Identity, Wallet & App Experience
description: Provides rider login, document wallet, order and claim visibility, support entry points, and self-service lifecycle actions.

name: Dealer & Service Partner Network Management
description: Onboards and governs dealer and service partners, manages coverage, credentials, SLAs, and partner performance.

name: Stock, Availability & Handover Planning
description: Tracks inventory, reservations, appointment capacity, and fulfillment readiness across dealers and service partners.

name: Service Case & Maintenance Orchestration
description: Coordinates diagnostics, maintenance, repair, inspections, replacement, and service closure workflows.

name: Insurance & Claims Administration
description: Manages policy application, claim intake, evidence collection, approvals, reimbursement, and replacement workflows.

name: Lease Origination & Credit Decisioning
description: Supports lease proposal creation, underwriting inputs, credit checks where applicable, and contract activation readiness.

name: Contract Lifecycle Management
description: Manages quotes, contracts, amendments, renewals, pauses, offboarding, and audit-ready contract history.

name: Settlement, Invoicing & Payroll Reconciliation
description: Handles employer invoicing, payroll deduction reconciliation, dealer settlement, and dispute-aware financial controls.

name: Remarketing, Refurbishment & Resale
description: Captures residual value through bike return, refurbish, resale, and next-life inventory flows.

name: Pool Bike & Fleet Management
description: Supports pooled and assigned bike assets with booking, assignment, access, policy enforcement, and asset-state management.

name: Trip, Telematics & Asset Monitoring
description: Collects usage, trip, and asset telemetry where operationally justified and legally permitted.

name: Identity & Access Management
description: Provides multi-tenant identity, authentication, authorization, and role-based access for riders, employers, partners, and internal teams.

name: Enterprise Integration Layer
description: Offers connectors, canonical data models, and event-driven integration with HRIS, payroll, ERP, CRM, and finance systems.

name: API Gateway & Developer Experience
description: Provides secure external and partner APIs, keys, throttling, documentation, and lifecycle governance.

name: Eventing & Process Backbone
description: Streams business events and coordinates asynchronous workflows across ordering, service, claims, and finance.

name: Workflow, Case & Exception Management
description: Supports multi-step back-office workflows, exception handling, SLA tracking, and coordinated resolution across teams.

name: Communications & Notifications
description: Handles triggered and human-in-the-loop communication across email, SMS, push, and in-app messages.

name: Operational Data, KPI & Analytics Platform
description: Creates the shared data foundation for operational reporting, unit economics, executive KPIs, and market-level performance analysis.

name: Compliance, Privacy & Audit Controls
description: Implements privacy, consent, auditability, financial control, and tax-sensitive compliance requirements across markets.

name: Observability & Reliability Operations
description: Provides logging, metrics, alerting, incident response, service health, and reliability management for the platform.
